title: Robinhood surges 30% after FTX exchange CEO takes stake in it
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) shares jumped 30% after crypto billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried was revealed to have become its third-largest shareholder, with a position worth around US$648mln. The stake was revealed after the stock slid to a 52-week low of US$7.71 on Thursday, having topped US$70 in the weeks after its initial public offer last July.

title: Robinhood Unveils Stock Lending Offering
text: Stock brokerage app Robinhood has launched a stock lending feature that lets its users lend out their fully paid stocks to borrowers recruited by the company. As the company announced Wednesday (May 4) on its website, users will be paid once their stocks are lent successfully.

text: It could earn you some passive income.

title: Robinhood to let users lend out their shares in its attempt to diversify revenue
text: Trading platform Robinhood is launching a feature that will allow its users to lend out their stocks in hopes of earning passive, recurring income from borrowers, the company announced today. Robinhood says the feature is currently being rolled out and will be available to all customers by the end of the month.

title: Robinhood launches stock lending program in revenue diversification push
text: Robinhood Markets Inc on Wednesday said it launched a fully-paid securities lending program, which lets the online broker's users lend out shares they own through the popular app to market participants and passively collect a cut of the fees.
